title: It Shouldn't Be This Hard Podcast

sections.title: It Shouldn't Be This Hard
sections.subtitle: The podcast for people who know that responsible business is messy, meaningful, and probably much harder than it should be.

left.alt: It Shouldn't Be This Hard podcast cover

right.body:
## Honest conversations most people avoid

In each episode, Grounded co-founders Heidi Schoeneck and Phil White sit down with founders, corporate change-makers, sustainability leaders, social entrepreneurs, and thought leaders.

Together they explore impact, climate action, storytelling, and the systemic barriers that frustrate real progress — drawing on perspectives from behavioral science to spirituality.

sections.sectionSubtitle: Maybe you've been there. You took the leap. You built the business. You challenged the status quo. And you've got the scars — and wisdom — to prove it.

items.title: Built It
items.body: You founded a purpose-driven business, scaled it through the messy middle, and have the scars (and wisdom) to prove it.

items.title: Pushing for Change
items.body: You're a corporate change-maker navigating legacy systems, internal politics, and the tension between profit and purpose.

items.title: Lived It
items.body: Your personal story demonstrates why this work matters — and the urgency of getting it right.

sections.heading: It's time to get grounded
sections.subtext: Ready to activate your brand purpose and accelerate your impact? Let's talk.
